title: Diamond Star Clear Glass Apothecary Jar Decorative Candy Buffet Jars Elegant Glass Storage Containers (Height: 15" Body: 6.5")
description:
About this item
AVAILABLE IN FOUR SIZES: These apothecary jars come in two styles and four different heights. Small Footed Glass Jar: H:9" D:5"; Large footed Glass Jar: H:12" D:5"; Small Jar without base: H:9" D:5"; Large sized Jar without base: H:15" D:6.5". Very stable and Made of hand-blown high-end sturdy clear glass.
LARGE FOOTED GLASS JAR: The candy jar for candy buffet measures about 15"( height ) x 6.5"(D) , with a capacity of about 88 fl.oz. It’s wide mouth is convenient for you to put in and take out the food you want to store, and it is also easy to clean.
GORGEOUS DECORATION JARS: This classic footed apothecary jar with lid is versatile and can be used with decor items. It looks great with sand, shells, pine cones, maples leaves or flowers to add energy flows into your environment.
WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATION: These candy canisters are not only suitable for the living room as decoration, but also for the bathroom as organizer and kitchen as storage for food. You can also decorate your wedding or party with delicate little desserts in our candy jars.
GUARANTEED: If the glass canister broken during transportation, please contact us and we will provide you with a replacement at the first time.

reviews_1s: The glass is of poor quality and maintained multiple flaws in the jar itself and the lid (small bubbles and imperfections). Totally disappointed and do not recommend.It was delivered in a million pieces
